evals.prompt: Create a Claude Code agent for code review. It should: read changed files, check for common issues (security, performance, naming), produce a structured review, and support configurable severity levels. Define the agent .md file with proper frontmatter.
evals.expected_output: Agent .md file with system prompt, tool selection, and review workflow

assertions.name: frontmatter
assertions.description: Agent frontmatter with name, description, model, and tools

assertions.name: system_prompt
assertions.description: System prompt defining the review workflow

assertions.name: tool_selection
assertions.description: Appropriate tools listed (Read, Grep, Glob)

assertions.name: structured_output
assertions.description: Review output format defined (findings with severity, file:line)

assertions.name: configurable
assertions.description: Severity levels or scope configurable

evals.prompt: Build an agent that generates database migrations. Given a description of schema changes, it should: read the current Prisma schema, generate the migration SQL, and create the migration file. Use the backend-developer agent as reference.
evals.expected_output: Migration generator agent with Prisma schema reading and SQL generation

assertions.name: agent_frontmatter
assertions.description: Proper frontmatter with name, description, tools (Read, Write, Bash)

assertions.name: reads_schema
assertions.description: Agent reads current Prisma schema before generating migration

assertions.name: generates_sql
assertions.description: Produces migration SQL based on requested changes

assertions.name: creates_file
assertions.description: Writes migration file to correct directory

assertions.name: verification
assertions.description: Runs migration and rollback to verify

evals.prompt: Create a multi-agent team coordinator. It dispatches 3 sub-agents in parallel: one for backend review, one for frontend review, one for security review. Then aggregates their findings into a combined report.
evals.expected_output: Coordinator agent that spawns sub-agents and aggregates results

assertions.name: dispatches_subagents
assertions.description: Spawns 3 sub-agents using the Agent tool

assertions.name: parallel_execution
assertions.description: Sub-agents launched in same message for parallelism

assertions.name: result_aggregation
assertions.description: Collects and combines results from all sub-agents

assertions.name: combined_report
assertions.description: Produces unified report with findings from all reviewers

assertions.name: error_handling
assertions.description: Handles sub-agent failures gracefully

evals.prompt: Build an agent for generating test cases. Given a source file, it should analyze the code, identify testable behaviors, generate test file with proper assertions, and run the tests to verify they pass.
evals.expected_output: Test generator agent that reads code, generates tests, and validates them

assertions.name: reads_source
assertions.description: Reads the source file to understand its API

assertions.name: identifies_behaviors
assertions.description: Lists testable behaviors before writing tests

assertions.name: generates_tests
assertions.description: Writes test file with proper test framework syntax

assertions.name: runs_tests
assertions.description: Executes tests to verify they pass

assertions.name: frontmatter
assertions.description: Agent frontmatter with Write and Bash tools

evals.prompt: Create a documentation agent that scans the codebase and generates a README with: project description, setup instructions, API overview, and architecture diagram. It should auto-detect the tech stack.
evals.expected_output: Documentation agent that explores codebase and generates comprehensive README

assertions.name: codebase_scan
assertions.description: Scans project files to detect tech stack and structure

assertions.name: readme_generation
assertions.description: Generates README.md with all specified sections

assertions.name: stack_detection
assertions.description: Auto-detects frameworks, databases, and tools from config files

assertions.name: architecture_diagram
assertions.description: Includes Mermaid architecture diagram

assertions.name: setup_instructions
assertions.description: Setup instructions match the detected tech stack
